# UX Checklist: Toggle Open-Data Layers in the Map UI

**Purpose**: Validate layer toggles, legends, and user guidance.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/025-open-data-layers/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Layer Controls

- [x] CHK-UX-001 Layer panel shows labeled toggles with default states.
- [x] CHK-UX-002 Loading indicators appear per layer while data is fetched.
- [x] CHK-UX-003 Legend updates with enabled layers.

## Layer Behavior

- [x] CHK-UX-004 Enabling a layer renders the overlay and disabling removes it fully.
- [x] CHK-UX-005 Multiple layers remain distinguishable and independent.
- [x] CHK-UX-006 Pan/zoom updates layers with debounced requests.

## Warnings & States

- [x] CHK-UX-007 Outage shows "Layer unavailable" and disables toggle.
- [x] CHK-UX-008 Partial coverage renders available data with warning.
- [x] CHK-UX-009 Performance mode and zoom-limit messages are visible when triggered.

## Consistency & Accessibility

- [x] CHK-UX-010 Labels align with shared naming conventions ("Layers", "Legend", "Layer unavailable").
- [x] CHK-UX-011 Basic accessibility pass (keyboard navigation + contrast) is part of UX gate.
